creator: mvg_freebsdbugs@giovannetti.ca
text:
Created attachment 188486
A patch for the jexec 8 man page warning about fib issues

After spending a lot of hours trying to troubleshoot using jails
with fibs, the revelation that I was not using the jail's fib when
executing a jexec utility command in a jail was heartbreaking.

This is anti-intuitive and must be warned about.  I submit the
following patch to the jexec.8 manual page for consideration.
